title: Iran-US deal nears finish line — but Trump and Khamenei must both say yes; Euronews analysis of remaining political hurdles
snippet: Euronews analysis assesses that the Iran-US deal is near completion at the technical negotiator level, but requires personal sign-off from both President Trump and Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Both face significant domestic political pressures working against signing: Trump from hawkish Republican factions demanding Iran's complete nuclear dismantlement, and Khamenei from hardliners opposing any deal with the US as a matter of ideological principle. Analysts note the deal could still collapse at the leadership level even with full negotiator agreement.
tag_reason: First analysis specifically identifying Khamenei as parallel approval bottleneck to Trump — adds Iranian domestic political dimension not covered in previous sources

entities.name: Trump Situation Room Final Determination Meeting (May 30)
